# usageregistry_target_type Resource

Registers an allowed target type and its allowed actions in the DynamoDB-backed usage registry.

Usage records referencing this target type can only use actions listed in `actions`. The provider stores this registry entry as a single DynamoDB item with `pk = "registry#target_type"` and `sk = <name>`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "usageregistry_target_type" "vault_secret" {
  name    = "vault_secret"
  actions = ["read"]

  annotations = {
    owner = "platform"
  }
}
```

```terraform
resource "usageregistry_target_type" "terraform_module" {
  name    = "terraform_module"
  actions = ["use"]
}
```

## Import

Import ID format is the target type name.

```shell
terraform import usageregistry_target_type.vault_secret vault_secret
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `actions` (Set of String) Allowed actions for this target type.
- `name` (String) Target type name. Must not contain `#`.

### Optional

- `annotations` (Map of String) Additional string annotations stored with the target type. The provider stores these values without interpreting them.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the target type was created.
- `id` (String) Stable importable target type identifier. Same as `name`.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the target type was last updated.
- `version` (Number) DynamoDB-backed target type version used for compare-and-swap updates.
